violations.text: Multiple containers were observed stacked with left over tape/residue. Food must be protected from miscellaneous sources of contamination. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026
The date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. Several tags were observed missing the date. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Chicken was stored above beef. Employee relocated product at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025
Discard time was not being recorded for chicken sandwiches. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025
Multiple containers were observed with left over tape/residue. Food must be protected from miscellaneous sources of contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink in the main dishwashing area was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 150-400 ppm. PIC stated the dishwashing company will be called today. Establishment to use other 3-bay sinks or dishwashers until sanitizer dispenser/tubing etc is fixed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2024

The delivery doors to the outside were observed not fully shut. PIC fully shut the doors. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2024

A insect trap was observed placed directly above a food prep sink. Food and food contact surfaces shall be protected from miscellaneous sources of contamination. Insect trap to be moved to another location or taken down. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. Ice machine to be emptied and washed rinsed and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2024
The vents in the deli walk-in and above the dish area were observed with an accumulation of dust and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2024
